_comment: Per-era slice of the jmsjmr_unity all_syst production (2026-07-23). Reruns for 2016 & 2017 after casa server bounce: switched to the regular coffea DaskExecutor (treereduce=true, worker-side tree reduction) with 9 GiB workers to survive the 'Client lost connection to scheduler' crashes the streaming path hit on these two eras. 2016APV & 2018 already completed on streaming. chunksize 25000.
